name: windows-everything-productionization
title: Productionize Windows Everything Search
description: Close SDK/CLI strategy, packaged native availability, diagnostics, Windows acceptance, and P50/P95 evidence for Everything search.
creator: TalexDreamSoul
notes: Implementation, integration, local production gates, diagnostics, canonical runtime resources, and hosted Windows CI/release gates are complete; first hosted run and packaged UI acceptance remain open.

meta.nextAction: After review and commit/push, run Windows Everything Production Gate, inspect its SDK/CLI/unavailable/package artifacts, then capture normal/@file/structured-filter packaged UI evidence and run strict acceptance verification.
meta.blocker: GitHub Actions cannot execute the uncommitted workflow; a committed ref and successful windows-2022 run are required. The hosted backend collector does not replace packaged CoreBox UI evidence.
meta.evidence: 9 native manifest/self-check tests and 161 focused Everything/Windows tests passed; CoreApp node/web typechecks and production build passed; lint:changed, PowerShell parser, actionlint, Trellis validation, and reviewer re-check passed. The configured hosted gate downloads the pinned SDK DLL, collects 200 SDK/CLI samples, enforces SDK P95/max, validates exact unavailable errors, packages Resources wrapper/manifest/native fail-closed, and uploads redacted artifacts; Windows artifacts are not yet produced.
